channel.title: About me on
channel.description: Recent content in About me on

item.title: CV
item.description:
You can access my CV below.

Last update: Spring 2025

item.title: Research
item.description:
Publications and Theses

To appear

  • Leonova, P. & Baklanov. A. (2026). Glagoly semantičeskogo polja ‘menjatʹ’ v norvežskom jazyke (bukmol) [Verbs of the semantic field ‘change’ in Norwegian Bokmål]. Acta Linguistica Petropolitana. Transactions of the Institute for Linguistic Studies. Saint Petersburg, Russia: Nauka.(Accepted, Under review; in Russian).

2025

  • Baklanov, A. (2025). Lexical Scope of Nominal Tense Markers: A Pilot Typological Study (Master’s thesis, HSE University).

2023

  • Baklanov, A. (2023). Nominal Tense And Semantically Similar Markers In Siberia As An Areal Feature (Bachelor’s thesis, HSE University).

2021

  • Baklanov, A. (2021). Javljaetsja li destinativ padežom v èvenskom jazyke? [Is destinative a case in Even?]. Proceedings of Malye jazyki v bolʹšoj lingvistike, 3, 18–26. Moscow: Buki Vedi. (in Russian).

Talks

2026

  • Semantics and Compatibility of Nominal Tense-like Markers in Mojeño Trinitario. OSUCHiLL 2026; OSU, Columbus, OH; March 27, 2026.
  • Questioning productivity as a criterion for nominal tense. CKLiC 2026; UKY, Lexington, KY; February 20-21, 2026.

2024

  • Nominal tense-like categories in Siberia: a case of Even and possible contact influence. CHRONOS 15; Université Toulouse — Jean Jaurès, Toulouse, France (online); May 29–31, 2024.

2022

  • Morphosyntactic complexities in (North-Eastern) Siberia: evidence for contact-induced convergence?. (co-authored with Alexey Vinyar, Alexandra Nogina, Daria Ignatenko, Tatiana Kazakova, Ivan Stenin). Language and population contact in north-eastern Siberia; WWU Münster, Münster, Germany; October 14–15, 2022.

2021

  • On semantics of Destinative in Even. XVIII Conference on Typology and Grammar for Young Scholars; The Institute for Linguistic Studies, RAS, Saint Petersburg, Russia (online).; November 25–27, 2021.
  • Semantic field ‘change’ in Norwegian. (co-authored with Polina Leonova). The Science of Language and Corpus-Based Technologies; NIU BelGU, Belgorod, Russia (online).; November 17–18, 2021.

2020

  • Is Destinative a case in Even?. III Conference “Minor languages in general linguistics”; MSU, Moscow, Russia (online).; April 23–24, 2021.
